A:\programs\git\emsdk\upstream\emscripten\emar.bat qc libmkb.a CMakeFiles/libmkb.dir/src/lib/stage_loader.c.o CMakeFiles/libmkb.dir/src/lib/ball_sim.c.o CMakeFiles/libmkb.dir/src/lib/camera_sim.c.o CMakeFiles/libmkb.dir/src/lib/world_sim.c.o CMakeFiles/libmkb.dir/src/lib/stage_anim.c.o CMakeFiles/libmkb.dir/src/lib/stobj_sim.c.o CMakeFiles/libmkb.dir/src/lib/item_sim.c.o CMakeFiles/libmkb.dir/src/world.c.o CMakeFiles/libmkb.dir/src/stage.c.o CMakeFiles/libmkb.dir/src/stobj.c.o CMakeFiles/libmkb.dir/src/stobj_goal.c.o CMakeFiles/libmkb.dir/src/item.c.o CMakeFiles/libmkb.dir/src/item_coin.c.o CMakeFiles/libmkb.dir/src/obj_collision.c.o CMakeFiles/libmkb.dir/src/lzs_decompress.c.o CMakeFiles/libmkb.dir/src/lib/host_load.c.o CMakeFiles/libmkb.dir/src/lib/host_os.c.o
